name: PHCoreDisabilityTypeCS
title: PH Core Disability Type Code System
description: Code system for types of disability as defined by the Philippine government for PWD registration.

concept.definition: Complete or partial loss of sight/visual function.
Complete or partial loss of hearing/hearing function.
Complete or partial loss of speech or communication function.
Impairment in physical/orthopedic function including locomotor disabilities.
Significant limitations in intellectual functioning and adaptive behavior.
Neurological disorders affecting acquisition and use of listening, speaking, reading, writing, reasoning, or mathematical abilities.
Mental health conditions and psychosocial impairments.
Significant visual impairment not correctable by standard glasses/contact lenses.
Complete loss of vision or light perception.
